result.error_summary: All benchmark measurements failed after the vLLM server rejected runtime-prompt external-KV loading.
result.server_error_excerpt: ValueError: Document KV vLLM loads require the full logical prompt; document_kv.prompt_text_mode='runtime' cannot be used

interpretation: Current vLLM native-provider Cachet handoffs require the full logical prompt, so this run cannot fill the primary Cachet + vanilla KV latency row. Keep primary Cachet latency cells blank until the serving path supports suffix-only runtime prompts or an equivalent prefill-elision contract.
